mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=EXTAPI_01-010#selectA0100enu */ CASE WHEN COUNT(TMMP.PRIV_ID) > 0 THEN '1' WHEN COUNT(TMAC.ACC_CONTROL) = 0 THEN '3' ELSE '2' END AS MENU_INFO_PRIV_FLAG, TMMS.SNMENU_ID AS MENU_ID, TMMS.SNMENU_NAME AS MENU_TITLE FROM TB_MED_MENU_NEW TMM INNER JOIN ( SELECT MENU_ID, SNMENU_ID, SNMENU_NAME FROM TB_MED_MENU_SN GROUP BY MENU_ID, SNMENU_ID, SNMENU_NAME ) TMMS ON TMM.MENU_ID = TMMS.MENU_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_PRIV_NEW TMMP ON TMM.MENU_ID = TMMP.MENU_ID AND TMMP.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_MED_ACC_CONTROL_NEW TMAC ON TMM.MENU_ID = TMAC.MENU_ID AND TMAC.ITEM_ID LIKE 'viewCtl%' AND TMAC.ACC_CONTROL != '1' AND TO_NUMBER(#{req.privId}) BETWEEN TO_NUMBER(TMAC.PRIV_ID_FROM) AND TO_NUMBER(TMAC.PRIV_ID_TO) WHERE (TMM.IS_LEAF = '1' OR TMM.IS_POPPAGE = '1') GROUP BY TMMS.SNMENU_ID, TMMS.SNMENU_NAME ORDER BY TMMS.SNMENU_ID ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE /* @SQLID=EXTAPI_01-012#deleteA012MenuByUserIdAndMenuIdAndPrivId */ FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW WHERE USER_ID = #{req.userId} AND MENU_ID IN ( SELECT TMMS.MENU_ID FROM TB_MED_MENU_SN TMMS WHERE ( 0 = 1 OR TMMS.SNMENU_ID = #{req.menuId} ) AND TMMS.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} UNION SELECT TMMP.MENU_ID FROM TB_MED_MENU_PRIV_NEW TMMP INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_NEW TMMN ON TMMP.MENU_ID = TMMN.MENU_ID AND ( TMMN.IS_LEAF = '1' OR TMMN.IS_POPPAGE = '1' ) WHERE TMMP.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @EXTAPI_01-012#insertA012Menu */ INTO TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW( USER_ID, MENU_ID, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME ) SELECT #{req.userId}, TMMS.MENU_ID, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.uptimestampUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE FROM TB_MED_MENU_SN TMMS WHERE ( 0 = 1 OR TMMS.SNMENU_ID = #{req.menuId} ) AND TMMS.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} UNION SELECT #{req.userId}, TMMP.MENU_ID, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.uptimestampUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE FROM TB_MED_MENU_PRIV_NEW TMMP INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_NEW TMMN ON TMMP.MENU_ID = TMMN.MENU_ID AND ( TMMN.IS_LEAF = '1' OR TMMN.IS_POPPAGE = '1' ) WHERE TMMP.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId}

INSERT /* @EXTAPI_01-012#insertA012OldMenu */ INTO TB_MED_GOV_MENU( USER_ID, MENU_ID, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME ) SELECT #{req.userId}, MENU_ID, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.uptimestampUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MENU_ID FROM ( SELECT TMMP.MENU_ID AS MENU_ID FROM TB_MED_MENU_PRIV TMMP INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU TMMN ON TMMP.MENU_ID = TMMN.MENU_ID AND ( TMMN.IS_LEAF = '1' OR TMMN.IS_POPPAGE = '1' ) WHERE TMMP.PRIV_ID = #{req.privId} ) inner_combined_menu_ids ) combined_menu_ids
mapper.select: SELECT /* @EXTAPI_01-013#selectA013AvailableMenu */ DISTINCT SN.SNMENU_ID AS MENU_ID, SN.SNMENU_NAME AS MENU_TITLE FROM ( SELECT A.MENU_ID FROM TB_MED_GOV_MENU_NEW A INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_NEW B ON A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{req.userId} AND (B.IS_LEAF = '1' OR B.IS_POPPAGE = '1') ) GM INNER JOIN TB_MED_MENU_SN SN ON GM.MENU_ID = SN.MENU_ID ORDER BY SN.SNMENU_ID ASC
